files.patch:
@@ -47,8 +47,19 @@ concurrency:
   cancel-in-progress: false
 
 jobs:
+  disabled-target:
+    name: Skip disabled target commit review
+    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'repository_dispatch' && github.event.client_payload.target_repo == 'openclaw/clawhub' && vars.CLAWSWEEPER_ENABLE_CLAWHUB != '1' }}
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Explain skipped commit review
+        run: |
+          echo "Skipping commit review for ${{ github.event.client_payload.target_repo }}."
+          echo "Set CLAWSWEEPER_ENABLE_CLAWHUB=1 after installing the ClawSweeper GitHub App on openclaw/clawhub."
+
   plan:
     name: Plan commits
+    if: ${{ !(github.event_name == 'repository_dispatch' && github.event.client_payload.target_repo == 'openclaw/clawhub' && vars.CLAWSWEEPER_ENABLE_CLAWHUB != '1') }}
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 20
     outputs:

@@ -70,7 +70,18 @@ concurrency:
   cancel-in-progress: false
 
 jobs:
+  disabled-target:
+    name: Skip disabled target commit finding
+    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'repository_dispatch' && github.event.client_payload.target_repo == 'openclaw/clawhub' && vars.CLAWSWEEPER_ENABLE_CLAWHUB != '1' }}
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Explain skipped commit finding
+        run: |
+          echo "Skipping commit finding repair for ${{ github.event.client_payload.target_repo }}."
+          echo "Set CLAWSWEEPER_ENABLE_CLAWHUB=1 after installing the ClawSweeper GitHub App on openclaw/clawhub."
+
   intake:
+    if: ${{ !(github.event_name == 'repository_dispatch' && github.event.client_payload.target_repo == 'openclaw/clawhub' && vars.CLAWSWEEPER_ENABLE_CLAWHUB != '1') }}
     runs-on: ${{ github.event.inputs.runner || vars.CLAWSWEEPER_COMMIT_FINDING_RUNNER || 'blacksmith-16vcpu-ubuntu-2404' }}
     timeout-minutes: 75
     steps:

@@ -135,9 +135,19 @@ concurrency:
   cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'repository_dispatch' && (github.event.client_payload.supersedes_in_progress == true || github.event.client_payload.supersedes_in_progress == 'true') }}
 
 jobs:
+  event-disabled-target:
+    name: Skip disabled target event
+    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'repository_dispatch' && github.event.client_payload.target_repo == 'openclaw/clawhub' && vars.CLAWSWEEPER_ENABLE_CLAWHUB != '1' }}
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Explain skipped event
+        run: |
+          echo "Skipping ${{ github.event.client_payload.target_repo }}#${{ github.event.client_payload.item_number || '?' }}."
+          echo "Set CLAWSWEEPER_ENABLE_CLAWHUB=1 after installing the ClawSweeper GitHub App on openclaw/clawhub."
+
   event-review-apply:
     name: Review, comment, and apply event item
-    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'repository_dispatch' }}

     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 120

@@ -93,6 +93,11 @@ Enable optional target commit check-runs with:
 CLAWSWEEPER_COMMIT_REVIEW_CREATE_CHECKS=true
 ```
 
+`openclaw/clawhub` commit dispatches are skipped while
+`CLAWSWEEPER_ENABLE_CLAWHUB` is not `1`. Turn that receiver variable on only
+after the ClawSweeper GitHub App is installed on `openclaw/clawhub`; otherwise
+the receiver cannot mint a target read token for commit review.
+
 Manual reviews can be started from the `ClawSweeper Commit Review` workflow in
 this repository. Inputs:

@@ -94,6 +94,11 @@ selected item with only immediate-safe close reasons enabled:
 still handles the broader backlog, with `stale_insufficient_info` blocked until
 the item is at least 30 days old.
 
+`openclaw/clawhub` dispatches are intentionally skipped while the receiver
+variable `CLAWSWEEPER_ENABLE_CLAWHUB` is not `1`. Enable it only after the
+ClawSweeper GitHub App is installed on `openclaw/clawhub`; otherwise the
+receiver cannot mint the target read/write tokens.
+
 The event job creates only a target read token before Codex runs. The target
 write token and the repository push token are introduced after Codex exits, and
 the same `apply-decisions` guard path still re-fetches the item before any
